name: forum_categories
title: Forum Categories
description: Discussion boards. A faithful port of a private predecessor-system's forum category model, not part of this repo: name/slug/description/icon plus a display_order and is_active flag for showing/hiding a board without deleting it.

fields.name: slug
fields.label: Slug
fields.help: URL-friendly identifier. Not auto-generated from name yet -- see dbbasic-package.json's deferred list.

fields.name: icon
fields.label: Icon
fields.help: A FA-style icon name (e.g. "comments"), carried from the source model. No icon rendering is wired up in this slice.

fields.name: is_active
fields.label: Active
fields.help: Inactive categories are hidden from the board list; the flag exists so a category can be retired without deleting its topics.
